title: re-enable + extend PromptParityTest (v1 + v2)

fullGradleTest.other_modules_status: all UP-TO-DATE / passing (compose-core, compose-sidekick, gradle-plugin, cli)

regression_attribution.root_cause: Task 5.8 (commit 226413d) regenerated bundled console app.js, removing the literal 'src? ' token. The console JS no longer contains 'src?' anywhere (verified via grep against fixthis-mcp/src/main/resources/console).
regression_attribution.git_log_evidence: git log -S"'src? '" -- fixthis-mcp/src/main/resources/console/ shows 226413d (Task 5.8) is the most recent removal commit.
regression_attribution.task_6_2_attribution: NONE. Task 6.2's 2-file diff (PromptParityTest.kt + plan.md) cannot affect FeedbackConsoleServerTest. Issue exists pre-Task 6.2.
regression_attribution.orchestrator_action_required: Update orchestrator state baseline OR add fixup task to update FeedbackConsoleServerTest.kt:765 (and any other 'src?' assertions) to match Phase 5 prompt-token shape. This should NOT block Task 6.2 acceptance.

notes: Task 6.2's direct deliverable is correct: PromptParityTest is re-enabled (no @Ignore), v2 cross-language parity test added, both tests pass byte-stable token comparison, skip count drops 1->0, +1 net passing test. The 3rd module failure is a pre-existing regression from Task 5.8 prompt.js rewrite that escaped earlier verification because no Task 5.x verifier ran the full :fixthis-mcp:test suite covering FeedbackConsoleServerTest. Verdict PASS for Task 6.2 scope; orchestrator should open follow-up to update FeedbackConsoleServerTest assertion strings to match new prompt token shape.
